series_metadata.series_description: Calculator tapes from state agencies that match the OAKS revenue documents submitted with check payments remitted to the Treasurer for processing. Also includes check tally reports and daily deposit reports from the check processing machine.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: later of following: conclusion of current fiscal year and two additional fiscal years, or annual audit of Treasurer corresponding fiscal year by Auditor of State is complete and final audit report has been published
